title: New Republic First Fleet
content:

(Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Sanrafsix]] *[[Battle of Kabal (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kabal]] *[[Liberation of Clak'dor VII]] *[[Battle of Sluis Van (Delvardus campaign)|Battle of Sluis Van]] *[[Battle of Mrisst (9 ABY)|Battle of Mrisst]] *[[Battle of Fondor]] |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' }} {{Quote|At this very moment, I, my staff, and my crew are imprisoned within the planetary shield of Coruscant. We are being hounded by a battle cruiser of the Coruscant Home Fleet. We want nothing but to return to our homeworld-but Princess Leia stands in our way, denying us the freedoms to which she so glibly gives lip service.|[[Nil Spaar]], manipulating the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]|}} The '''New Republic First Fleet''', also known as the '''First Battle Group''', was one of the major fleets of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. After being assigned to the defense of the galactic capital [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], it was known as the '''Home Guard Fleet''' and the '''Coruscant Home Fleet''', or simply the '''Coruscant Fleet'''. ==History== {{Quote|The First Fleet is doing all it can, but the enemy is literally flinging their coralskippers at any target that presents itself.|[[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand|Brand]], during the [[Battle of Fondor]]|}} [[File:First_Fleet_advance.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The First Fleet campaign advances during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].]] The New Republic First Fleet was one of the four original fleets of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] activated in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Firmus Nantz]], the First Fleet fought in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends#The advance of the New Republic (4-6 ABY)|New Republic liberation campaign]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|Warlords]]. After the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|liberation]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], the First Fleet was permanently assigned to the defense of the New Republic capital world by [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]. It was tasked with protecting the [[New Republic Provisional Council]] headquarters and was commanded by Admiral [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson]]. During the [[Thrawn campaign]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] [[Battle of Mrisst (9 ABY)|attacked]] the planet [[Mrisst/Legends|Mrisst]] to distract the Coruscant sector fleet away from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. This strategy left Coruscant defenseless when Thrawn launched the [[Siege of Coruscant]]. In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], the First Fleet was still stationed at Coruscant. Just before the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] sent it to patrol the [[Thunder Alley]] and relieve the [[New Republic Second Fleet|Second Fleet]] that had been on patrol the longest without home service and shipyard services. During the [[Almanian Uprising]] in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Kueller]] planned to destroy the Coruscant Fleet using bombs hidden into [[Droid/Legends|droids]] slated for service aboard the fleet. However the droids were stolen by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and [[Bombing of the Smuggler's Run|detonated]] in [[Smuggler's Run/Legends|Smuggler's Run]].''[[The New Rebellion]]''[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the First Fleet was stationed at [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] to protect the strategical [[Fondor Shipyards/Legends|Fondor Shipyards]] following the [[First Battle of Obroa-skai]]. The fleet was present at the [[Battle of Fondor]], where many of its ships were destroyed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Later in the war, surviving ships of the New Republic First Fleet became the [[First Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance First Fleet]]. ==Behind the scenes== The Home Guard Fleet was first mentioned in the ''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'' as the New Republic fleet that defended Coruscant. The novel ''[[Before the Storm]]'' later created the First Fleet and the Coruscant Home Fleet. Although the First Fleet was described as the fleet defending Coruscant, the novel did not formerly make any link between the First Fleet and the Coruscant Home Fleet. Finally, ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' clearly identified the First Fleet as the Coruscant home guard. ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' later confirmed that the First Fleet was permanently assigned to the defense of Coruscant after its liberation. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{ID|Alliance Home Guard}} *''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} {{ID|Coruscant sector fleet}} *[[The Last Command (abridged audiobook)|''The Last Command'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} *''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{Mo}} {{1stID|First Fleet|Coruscant Home Fleet}} *[[Before the Storm (abridged audiobook)|''Before the Storm'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} *''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{Mo}} {{1stID|Coruscant Fleet}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}} {{ID|First Fleet}} *[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse'' abridged audiobook]] ==Sources== *''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}} {{1stID|Home Guard Fleet}} *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' {{ID|Home Guard Fleet}} *''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' {{ID|Home Guard Fleet}} *''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' {{ID|First Fleet}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|Home Guard Fleet}} *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] {{ID|Coruscant Fleet}} *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' {{ID|Home Guard Fleet}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{1stID|First Battle Group}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' {{1stID|New Republic First Fleet}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' {{ID|First Fleet}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Erste Flotte |es=Primera Flota de la Nueva República }} [[Category:Coruscant organizations]] [[Category:New Republic fleets|First Fleet]]
